analysis.btc_price_note: BTC ~$76,300–$78,450 on May 1 (avg ~$77,000). Up +2% in 24h after FOMC dip to $75,000. Resistance at $80,000 not yet broken. 74% of altcoins still in the red despite BTC recovery.
sentiment_key_signals: BTC +2% in 24h — recovery from $75,000 post-FOMC dip
74% of crypto coins lost value in 24h — broad market weakness persists
FOMC Apr 29: hawkish hold at 3.5–3.75%, unusual 8-4 dissent, rate cut odds fell to 44%
Fed statement upgraded inflation language to 'elevated' from 'somewhat elevated'
ETF monthly inflow April: ~$2B net positive — monthly trend bullish
ETF single-day Apr 29: $138M outflow — short-term headwind
Ark Invest: BTC market cap target $16T by 2030, price $300K–$1.5M
Senate Clarity Act markup scheduled May 2026 — regulatory tailwind
North Korea-linked hacks ~$577M in 2026 YTD — security/FUD headwind
Consensus 2026 conference May 5–7 Miami — potential sentiment catalyst
analysis.macro_backdrop: FOMC held rates at 3.5-3.75% on Apr 29 with hawkish tone — reinforces higher-for-longer, weighing on risk assets. ISM Manufacturing today (medium). Next major catalysts: NFP May 8, CPI May 12, PPI May 13. No FOMC until Jun 2026.
analysis.regime_rationale: Neutral (0.40): BTC recovering +2% with strong monthly ETF inflows and institutional demand, but FOMC hawkish hold (rate cut odds 44%), single-day ETF outflow, and weak altcoin breadth (74% down) offset bulls. Mixed signals warrant neutral. Bot filter INACTIVE — confidence 0.40 < 0.50 threshold.
